creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tried the patches with the following mailbox configuration for my 
gmail account in ~/.asmailrc but it doesn't work, I'm probably doing 
something wrong:

mailbox {
	type pop3
	auth plain md5
	server pop.gmail.com
	user r.c.ladan@gmail.com   # also "r.c.ladan@gmail.com" , r.c.ladan
	password "my password"
	update 120
	timeout 30
}

It displays the asmail icon with -/- , the verbose line shows
1 > [46168064] R	0/0
and
1 > [46168064]   C	0/0

while I actually have unread mail on the gmail.com web page.

René
